title: Wemmbu Jr Textures
description: This is my texture pack and I worked really hard to make it so enjoy.
body: This The Best Texture Pack Of Many To Come So Sit Tight it has many things like a sword if you name it bloodmoon, qd or soul you get custom textures and custom gui and animated items but more will come soon so wait and sit tight by luv you guyss :).![if you name a netherite sword qd you get this texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b83eb4dfe3738e5121c23a68c2e47cb628ceb1.png) Also in this texture pack there is animated netherite sword and wind charges netherite hoe looks like a scythe and if you name a netherite sword bloodmoon you get this texture:![j](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7115128bc1d86a60154817a68a969d5524d67087.png) the fishing rod looks like this:![l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/640c8d8d91bdfc936111337b9908d47cccf39870.png) and more stuff like the mace when ever you use the smash attack it makes a bonk sound and there is low shield and low fire aswell as custom netherite trim colors on diamond armor and netherite armor and animated potion overlays.
